name: p31-discord-bot
description: P31 Labs Discord Bot with cognitive accessibility features

scripts.inspect:bot: npm run build && node -r ./scripts/bot-quiet.cjs dist/qa/cli.js inspect
scripts.sync:bot: npm run build && node -r ./scripts/bot-quiet.cjs dist/qa/cli.js sync
scripts.simulate:bot: npm run build && node -r ./scripts/bot-quiet.cjs dist/qa/cli.js simulate
scripts.suite:bot: npm run build && node -r ./scripts/bot-quiet.cjs dist/qa/cli.js all
scripts.sync:bot:check: npm run build && node -r ./scripts/bot-quiet.cjs dist/qa/cli.js sync-check
scripts.verify:bot: npm run build && npm test && node -r ./scripts/bot-quiet.cjs dist/qa/cli.js all && node -r ./scripts/bot-quiet.cjs dist/qa/cli.js sync-check
